title: hieracium rigidum subsp. internatum
intro: Hieracium rigidum subsp. internatum, also known as stiff hawk's-beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation, due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium rigidum subsp. internatum include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
